name: 10 MG Rosuvastatin Tablets IP
about: 10 MG Rosuvastatin Tablets IP is a widely used drug type of general medicines that helps in reducing bad cholesterol levels and increasing good cholesterol levels in the body. It is a highly effective medication that is recommended by doctors to patients with high cholesterol levels. The medication comes in a physical form of tablets and is packed in a box containing 10x15 tablets. The medicine is manufactured in India and should be stored in a dry and cool place.

faq.q: What is the recommended dosage of 10 MG Rosuvastatin Tablets IP?
faq.a: The recommended dosage of 10 MG Rosuvastatin Tablets IP should be as per the suggestion of your doctor.

faq.q: What is the physical form of 10 MG Rosuvastatin Tablets IP?
faq.a: The physical form of 10 MG Rosuvastatin Tablets IP is tablets.

faq.q: How should I store 10 MG Rosuvastatin Tablets IP?
faq.a: You should store 10 MG Rosuvastatin Tablets IP in a dry and cool place.

faq.q: What is the origin of 10 MG Rosuvastatin Tablets IP?
faq.a: The origin of 10 MG Rosuvastatin Tablets IP is India.

faq.q: How many tablets are packed in a box of 10 MG Rosuvastatin Tablets IP?
faq.a: A box of 10 MG Rosuvastatin Tablets IP contains 10x15 tablets.
